name: National Provider Identifier (NPI)
summary: Detects US NPI numbers with Luhn checksum validation
description: Detects US National Provider Identifier (NPI) numbers with Luhn checksum validation. NPI is a 10-digit number assigned to healthcare providers by CMS.

metadata.compliance_notes: NPI is used in HIPAA transactions and is considered a provider identifier
metadata.format: 10 digits with Luhn check digit (prefix 80840 for Luhn calculation)

effect.message: NPI number tokenized (Luhn validated) for de-identification
